name: dawson-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins by Dawson Pitcher.

plugins.name: merge-conflict-tool
plugins.description: Carefully resolve git merge, rebase, or cherry-pick conflicts using paired defender subagents to prevent bias toward 'ours'. Auto-invokes on git CONFLICT or halted merge state. Includes scope tiering, integration-overlap detection, mandatory frontend visual verification, and pre-existing debt disambiguation.
